news.headline: How Norwegian researchers are using satellite images to track tourism’s environmental impact
news.summary: Norway’s northern Lofoten Islands are attracting an increasing number of tourists, raising concerns about the environmental impact. To help document these effects, Norwegian researchers have launched a new project that utilises satellite images.
